arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Morecambe simulated to get a score prediction for FA Cup clash
arts.sum: The beginning of the new year means the return of the FA Cup for Premier League clubs, with Chelsea looking to go one better than last season when they lost 1-0 to Manchester City in the semi-finals. Chelsea will be looking to get off to a winning start in the FA Cup later today when the Blues welcome League Two Morecambe to Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: £20m Chelsea player desperately needs to leave in this window after Enzo Maresca's comments - opinion
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca deserves credit for attempting to share the minutes around the squad in the first half of the season, but there are some players...

arts.ttl: Maresca makes BRUTAL admission over Chelsea star's future
arts.sum: While Chelsea were able to shift on the likes of Raheem Sterling and Trevoh Chalobah, albeit on loan, Cesare Casadei, Carney Chukwuemeka and Ben Chilwell all failed to find transfers away and were hoping for a rare run out in this weekend’s FA Cup clash with Morecambe . However, Maresca admitted the players were still unlikely to be part of his squad, and should continue to seek moves away, saying: “Carney won't be included.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Morecambe: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea start their 2024/25 FA Cup campaign with a visit from League Two outfit Morecambe in the third round. Enzo Maresca's team are without victory in their last four following some post-Christmas blues but their winless streak will likely come to an end against a Morecambe outfit currently languishing second from bottom in the fourth tier.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: West Ham boss Graham Potter to move for Blues duo?
arts.sum: Two of Chelsea's fringe members reportedly emerge as January transfer targets for new West Ham United head coach Graham Potter.

arts.ttl: 'I joined Chelsea from Man Utd like Kobbie Mainoo could – it was my biggest career regret'
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo is still being paid just £20,000 per week by Manchester United and has been unable to agree terms over a new contract, which has sparked Chelsea's interest in the January transfer window
